title: DSA Roadmap Track
description: Schema for a curated DSA roadmap track document compatible with the Track MongoDB model.

description.description: A brief description of this track (1-2 sentences).

order.description: Display sort order in the UI. Lower numbers appear first.

title.description: The EXACT title as shown on LeetCode. Must match official casing and wording.

titleSlug.description: URL slug extracted from the LeetCode URL. Lowercase, hyphens, digits only.

difficulty.description: Difficulty level. Exactly one of: Easy, Medium, Hard (Title Case).

url.description: Canonical LeetCode URL. Must be https, end with trailing slash, no query params.
